title: Prince Albert (Saskatchewan) - Canada.ca
content:
## Prince Albert Saskatchewan

## Prince Albert Saskatchewan
Prince Albert, in Saskatchewan, is a city at the junction of the prairies and the boreal forest, often called the “Gateway to the North.” It is an economic and cultural centre for the region and benefits from its proximity to the many natural reserves and surrounding parks. A river runs through the city, offering picturesque landscapes and a variety of recreational activities. The region offers an exceptional quality of life, with plenty of opportunities to work and raise a family in a dynamic multicultural community.
Where is Prince Albert?
